ab: dremaudraw anga ken a kemacu tua inepic.
en: A: I forgot to bring my pen.

ab: malim anga ken a kemacu tua inepic.
ku pasedjamai sun.
en: B: I'll borrow you.

ab: dremaudrav aken a kemacu tua qecap.
en: A: I forgot to bring my chopsticks.

ab: malim anga ken a kemacu tua qecap.
en: A: I forgot to bring my chopsticks.

ab: ini aken uta a nakemacu, ari veli-i.
en: B: I don't have one either, let's go buy one.

ab: ari veli-i tua inepic ui?
en: A: Let's go buy a pen, shall we?

ab: vaiki a veneli tua inepic ui?
en: A: Let's go buy a pen, shall we?

ab: nanguaq, sa uri veneli anan aken tua siquliqulip.
en: B: Well, I still have to buy erasers.

ab: ui, uri veneli aken uta tua siquliqulip.
en: B: Well, I still have to buy erasers.

ab: ari veli-i tua tja kenamain ui?
en: A: Let's go get breakfast, shall we?

ab: tjuari, na kenama anga ken i tjumaq.
en: B: No, I've already eaten at home.

ab: dremaudraw anga ken a semeljec tua bintu.
en: A: I forgot to steam my lunchbox.

ab: malim anga ken a semeljec tua bintu.
en: A: I forgot to steam my lunchbox.

ab: sau seljecu a kirimu.
en: B: Take it to the heat!

ab: vaiku a semeljec a kirimu.
en: B: Take it to the heat!

ab: dremaudraw anga ken a kemacu tua bintu.
en: A: I forgot to bring my lunchbox.

ab: malim anga ken a kemacuc tua bintu.
en: A: I forgot to bring my lunchbox.

ab: pai tja kanaw a ku bintu numaya.
ch: B:那我們一起吃我的便當吧!
en: B: Then let's eat my lunch box together!

ab: anema uri su cengelj?
en: A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: uri anema a su inecengeljen?
en: A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: uri keman aken tua sinancengelj nua gakku.
ch: B:我要吃學校的營養午餐。
en: B: I want a nutritious school lunch.

ab: anema uri su cengelj?
en: A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: uri keman su tua nema tua cengelj?
en: A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: nakemasi cenglj a ken tua bintu tucu, pai kaljingulji a kincengelj!
ch: B:我今天有帶便當，我們中午一起吃吧!
en: B: I've brought a lunchbox today, let's eat together at noon!

ab: vaiki a menali tua lanciyu ui?
en: A: Let's go play basketball, shall we?

ab: nanguaq! ari.
en: B: Okay! Let's go.

ab: vaiki a menalji tua pangciyu ui?
en: A: Shall we go play baseball?

ab: ini, inika ken a vaik, uri kitulu aken.
en: B: No, I want to study.

ab: pai alapan aken tua suapan.
en: A: Please help me with the broom.

ab: ui, ku sivayan cu a suapan tjanusun.
en: B: Okay, here's a broomstick for you.

ab: pai alapan aken tua zuking ui?
en: A: Can you help me with the cloth?

ab: semuasuap anan aken, alapan aken ayau ti Adrang.
en: B:B: I'm sweeping the floor and you asked Adrang to get it for you.

ab: namakasuap anga sun?
en: A: Are you done sweeping?

ab: makasuap anga aken.
en: B: I swept it.

ab: aqu sun a inika semuasuap?
en: A: Why don't you clean up?

ab: makasuap anga aken.
en: B: I've finished cleaning up.

ab: kungai aravac a kasintan, sau zukingu!
en: A: The floor is dirty, go clean it.

ab: ui, vaik aken a malap tua zuking.
en: B: Okay, I'll go get the cloth.

ab: kungai aravac azua qezung, sau zukingu.
ch: A:那個窗戶很髒，去擦一下。
en: A: That window is very dirty, go clean it.

ab: galju anan, inikanan a ken a makasuap ta imaza.
ch: B:等一下，我還沒掃完這裡。
en: B: Wait a minute, I'm not done sweeping here yet.

ab: uri kemuda sun nu sauni?
en: A: What are you doing later?

ab: anema uri su kudain nu sauni?
en: A: What are you doing later?

ab: uri vaik aken a kipakim tjai sinsi.
en: B: I'm going to see my teacher.

ab: anema su kudain nu qemacuvung itjen tua tja kitulu i gakku?
en: A: What do you do after school?

ab: uri kemuda sun nu makakitulu itjen i gakku?
en: A: What do you do after school?

ab: uri vaik aken a semenay katua ku qali.
en: B: I'm going to sing with my friends.

ab: uri kemuda timadju nu qemacuvung tua kitulu?
en: A: What's he doing after school?

ab: uri vaik timadju a ljemanguy.
en: B: He's going swimming.
